text: I opened exactly 15 new GitHub issues in the 'acme/web' repository for merged pull requests that close Linear issues.

tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def merged-prs (filter (fn [pr] (contains? pr :closes_linear)) (github_pull_requests {:state \"merged\"})))\n(def issues-to-create (map (fn [pr] {:title (str \"Verify: \" (:title pr)) :state \"open\" :repository \"acme/web\"}) merged-prs))\n(count (insert! :github_issues issues-to-create))"}
